sample_record_data.title: Tailored Linen Wide Leg Trouser.
sample_record_data.description: Tailored wide leg silhouette for a contemporary, sophisticated look Linen blend fabric offering breathability and natural texture High-rise waistband creating an elongated leg appearance Clean front design with minimal detailing for versatile styling options Full-length cut with approximately 111cm inseam for dramatic drape These tailored wide leg trousers embody refined relaxed luxe with their fluid silhouette and natural texture. The generous proportions create a dramatic sweep as you move, whilst the high-rise waist defines your silhouette with understated elegance. Style with a coordinating sleeveless top for a modern monochromatic ensemble, as shown, and add a structured clutch for dimension. These trousers transition effortlessly from office to evening events-pair with a crisp cotton shirt and pointed flats for daytime sophistication, or elevate with a silk camisole and statement jewellery for dinner occasions. The linen blend construction ensures these trousers maintain their shape whilst offering breathability, making them an excellent choice for warm-weather professional settings or summer social gatherings. A true investment piece from Karen Millen that reflects expert craftsmanship and contemporary design sensibility.

results.sample_title: Samba OG Wmns "Cow Print - Pink" KK2239

sample_record_data.title: Samba OG Wmns "Cow Print - Pink" KK2239
sample_record_data.description: Shop ADIDAS Samba OG Wmns "Cow Print - Pink". In Stock for fast shipping. Authenticity Guaranteed. Shop verified sneakers, apparel and collectibles at Stadium Goods.
sample_record_data.product_details: The Samba OG "Cow Print - Pink" delivers a radical, high-craft execution of the 1950s soccer icon, masterfully blending its terrace heritage with a playful, maximalist "Western-core" aesthetic. This iteration is defined by its premium pony hair upper, featuring a bold, multi-tonal cow print in chocolate brown and off-white that provides a tactile, artisanal strike to the foundation. The design is further elevated by refreshing "Wonder Quartz" pink accents on the serrated Three Stripes and heel tab, injecting a soft, feminine energy into the rugged animal pattern. Grounded by the signature dark gum rubber cupsole for elite grip and vintage appeal, this release successfully pairs the Samba’s timeless athletic DNA with a daring, "maximalist-pop" aesthetic suitable for any modern capsule wardrobe.
